progress_summary: Gate for the Option C v3 changelog preview, release-hero iteration (design(changelog): latest release mirrors the Coming Next hero — v1.4.2 now uses the v1.5 hero layout re-themed to the accent highlight). On maintainer approval, port Option C v3 into site/src/pages/changelog.astro — fold the roadmap data out of RoadmapTimeline.astro into the 2-tab layout; that real implementation re-runs the full suite (tsc/vitest/astro build/e2e).
